name: Amazon sellers processing 50–100 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders and supplier penalties. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between inventory shipments and purchase records lead to late orders and supplier penalties.
features: Manual entry for shipment and purchase records

locked_fields.primary_problem: Discrepancies between inventory shipments and purchase records lead to late orders and supplier penalties.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders and supplier penalties. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual reconciliation of inventory and purchase records.
must_have_features: Manual entry for shipment and purchase records

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 50–100 invoices/month, discrepancies cause late orders and supplier penalties. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation.
